debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
⊢ MaxDegreeLE (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM') 2

failed_attempts:
rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  apply (encard_mono _).trans (encard_union_le (M ∩ E(G, v)) (M' ∩ E(G, v)))
  · exact add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
  intro e he
  rw [restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict] at he
  simp only [mem_inter_iff, mem_setOf_eq, mem_diff, mem_symmDiff_iff] at he
  rcases he with ⟨(⟨hm, _⟩ | ⟨hm', _⟩), -, h_inc⟩
  · left; exact ⟨hm, h_inc⟩
  · right; exact ⟨hm', h_inc⟩
